extension.name: Joomla! Audio Archive Package
extension.author: Frank Willeke
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later
extension.description: Audio Archive is a Joomla! 6 package for managing and publishing large searchable collections of audio clips. This development package currently installs the Audio Archive component, including administrator upload, directory import, metadata and category/tag management, plus the public archive, filtering, protected playback, clip detail pages, and original-file downloads. No modules or plugins are included in this development build; additional modules and integration plugins are planned for later releases.
